title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.145 - Missouri safe boating week designated for the first full week of May before Memorial Day
text:
9.145.  Missouri safe boating week designated for the first full week of May before Memorial Day. — The first full week of May before Memorial Day is hereby designated as "Missouri Safe Boating Week".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to observe the week with appropriate activities and events.
(L. 2015 H.B. 402)
